name: Blue Prism (SS&C) Robotic Process Automation REST API
what_it_does: Blue Prism (SS&C Technologies subsidiary) robotic process automation REST API for enterprises to orchestrate software robots, manage digital worker deployments, schedule RPA processes, monitor robot performance, and govern automation at scale — enabling automated business process automation, exception handling, work queue management, and robot fleet management through Blue Prism's enterprise RPA platform. Enables AI agents to manage process management for RPA process scheduling and execution automation, handle digital worker management for robot session lifecycle automation, access work queue management for work item assignment and processing automation, retrieve exception management for process exception capture and retry automation, manage credential management for secure credential vault and robot credential automation, handle release management for process package deployment and version management automation, access dashboard for robot performance and utilization monitoring automation, retrieve audit for compliance audit trail and process logging automation, manage environment management for multi-environment deployment promotion automation, and integrate Blue Prism with enterprise applications, APIs, and attended automation for enterprise RPA governance automation.
use_cases: Scheduling and monitoring RPA robot fleets for enterprise process automation agents
Managing work queues and distributing items to digital workers for back-office automation agents
Deploying and versioning RPA process packages across environments for DevOps automation agents
Monitoring robot exceptions and triggering remediation for operations automation agents
not_for: Simple task automation without enterprise governance (Blue Prism is enterprise-grade RPA; simpler tools handle lightweight automation)
Real-time interactive attended automation at consumer scale (Blue Prism is unattended back-office RPA, not attended consumer-facing)
API-native automation without legacy screen-scraping needs (Blue Prism excels at UI automation; API-first tools are simpler for API-only use cases)
best_when: A large enterprise wanting AI agents to orchestrate and monitor unattended robot fleets, manage work queues, and govern RPA process deployments through Blue Prism's enterprise-grade robotic process automation platform.
avoid_when: SS&C ACQUISITION CHANGED FOCUS: Blue Prism was acquired by SS&C Technologies ($1.5B, 2022); automated independent-product assumption creates product_roadmap_uncertainty for long-term platform direction; automated should evaluate current SS&C Blue Prism roadmap and SS&C integration strategy. ENTERPRISE LICENSE REQUIRED: Blue Prism requires enterprise license agreement; automated open-developer assumption creates license_required; Blue Prism is not available for self-service; automated must have SS&C Blue Prism agreement. PROCESSES MUST BE BUILT IN BLUE PRISM: RPA processes are developed in Blue Prism Studio (visual designer); automated API-creates-process assumption creates no_process_to_run for API calls to processes not developed in Blue Prism Studio; automated must build processes in Blue Prism Studio before orchestrating via API. ROBOT INFRASTRUCTURE IS SEPARATE: Blue Prism robots run on dedicated Windows VMs or VDI; automated serverless assumption creates infrastructure_gap for RPA requiring dedicated robot machine infrastructure; automated must provision and manage robot machine infrastructure.

auth.notes: Blue Prism uses OAuth2 for RPA Hub REST API. REST API with JSON. Warrington, UK HQ (now SS&C Technologies subsidiary). Blue Prism founded 2001 by Alastair Bathgate and David Moss. Acquired by SS&C Technologies 2022 ($1.5B). Products: Blue Prism Cloud, Blue Prism Enterprise, Blue Prism Hub (orchestration), Blue Prism Interact (attended). 2,000+ enterprise clients. 70,000+ digital workers deployed. Competes with UiPath, Automation Anywhere, and Pega for enterprise RPA.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public trial; production requires SS&C Blue Prism enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per digital worker; Blue Prism Cloud and Enterprise; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Warrington UK. SS&C subsidiary. 2,000+ enterprise clients. 70,000+ digital workers. Enterprise RPA platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; orchestration APIs throttled per Blue Prism Hub capacity

known_agent_gotchas: PROCESS NAMES ARE CASE-SENSITIVE: Blue Prism process names in API calls are case-sensitive; automated normalized-name assumption creates process_not_found for process names with incorrect casing; automated must use exact process names as configured in Blue Prism Studio

WORK QUEUE ITEMS HAVE LOCK STATES: Work queue items are locked during processing; automated always-available assumption creates item_locked for work items already being processed by another robot; automated must handle locked item states and retry logic

SESSION STATUS POLLING IS REQUIRED: Robot session execution is asynchronous; automated sync-completion assumption creates incomplete_check for session status queried before completion; automated must poll session status until terminal state (Completed, Stopped, Terminated)

ENVIRONMENTS HAVE SEPARATE CREDENTIALS: Blue Prism environments (Development, Test, Production) use separate credential vaults; automated credential-portability assumption creates credential_not_found for credentials not replicated to target environment; automated must manage credentials per environment

EXCEPTIONS REQUIRE MANUAL INTERVENTION: Process exceptions in Blue Prism require manual review or automated exception handling processes; automated self-healing assumption creates exception_backlog for exceptions not handled by exception management processes; automated must implement exception management workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise RPA. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Business process automation and credential vault data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise RPA. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Business process and credential data.
